trades.title: Trade Journal Entry
trades.description: Represents a single recorded trade in the user's trading journal.

userId.description: The UID of the user who logged this trade

pair.description: The financial instrument or trading pair (e.g. BTCUSD, EURUSD)

strategy.description: The name or ID of the trading strategy used

entryReason.description: Markdown or text listing what indicators or analysis triggered the entry

direction.description: The direction of the trade (Long or Short)

time.description: ISO timestamp for the trade execution time

profit.description: Net profit or loss amount. Positive for profit, negative for loss.

mistake.description: Any mistakes made during execution (e.g. FOMO, early exit, skipped stop loss)

images.description: List of base64 values or public URLs for multiple screenshot images

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was created on server

strategies.title: Trading Strategy
strategies.description: A trading strategy predefined or created by the user to organize journal entries.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this strategy

name.description: The name of the strategy (e.g. Order Block, Support & Resistance Breakout)

description.description: The description or rules of the strategy

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was created

trades/{tradeId}.description: User logged trades collection mapped by tradeId.

strategies/{strategyId}.description: User defined strategies collection mapped by strategyId.
